sections.paragraph:
χόρτος, ου, ὁ [IE; ‘farmyard, pasturage’] ‘green growth’

—a. as associated with a field or meadow grass Mt 6:30; 14:19; Lk 12:28; J 6:10; Js 1:10f; 1 Pt 1:24; Rv 8:7; 9:4.

—b. of planted grain showing a blade in its early stage plant Mt 13:26.

—c. of grassy growth in its dried stage hay 1 Cor 3:12.
